song.title: Give Me Jesus
song.author: Fernando Ortega
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C B
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A F#m In the morning when I rise, . D2 A2 A In the morning when I rise, . F#m D Bm7 E A In the morning when I rise, |give me Jesus.
[C] . C#m F#m D A Give me Jesus, give me Jesus . D/A A/E You can have all this world, . D2 A But give me Jesus.
[V2] And when I am alone, Oh, and when I am alone, And when I am alone give me Jesus.
[V3] And when I come to die, Oh, and when I come to die, And when I come to die, give me Jesus.
[B] . C#m F#m D A Give me _Jesus, give me Jesus . D/A A/E You can have all this world, . D2 A/E You can have all this world, . Bm7 A/E You can have all this world, . D2 A But give me Jesus.
